events.name: Portland Trail Blazers at Denver Nuggets

headlines.description: - Nikola Jokic recorded his 35th triple-double of the season and both he and Jamal Murray scored 22 points Sunday when the Denver Nuggets celebrated the return of Peyton Watson by cooling off the Portland Trail Blazers 128-112.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nikola Jokic posts his 28th triple-double as the Nuggets beat the Trail Blazers 128-112

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brooklyn Nets vs. Sacramento Kings: Game Highlights) 2026/03/22 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Malik Monk scored 10 of his 32 points in the final five minutes, Devin Carter made a pair of clutch free throws with 6.6 seconds remaining and the Sacramento Kings held off the Brooklyn Nets 126-122 on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Malik Monk's late scoring flurry helps the Kings hold off Nets 126-122

events.name: Washington Wizards at New York Knicks

headlines.description: — Karl-Anthony Towns had 26 points and 16 rebounds, Jalen Brunson scored 23 points and the New York Knicks beat the Washington Wizards 145-113 on Sunday night for their sixth straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks rout Wizards 145-113 to win their 6th straight and send Washington to its 16th straight loss

headlines.description: — Bones Hyland scored 23 points, Jaden McDaniels had 19 and the Minnesota Timberwolves beat the Celtics 102-92 to snap an 18-game losing streak in Boston.
headlines.shortLinkText: Timberwolves snap 18-game skid in Boston by beating Celtics 102-92

headlines.description: — Devin Booker scored 25 points, Jalen Green added 20 and the Phoenix Suns snapped a five-game losing streak by beating the Toronto Raptors 120-98 on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Devin Booker scores 25, Suns cruise past the Raptors 120-98 to end a 5-game skid
